summary: Import Interventions History feature testing completed successfully. All 11 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified: Historique tab shows 'Importé' badges, Batiment detail modal shows linked interventions with imported badge, ImportInterventions component accessible via Paramètres > Imports CSV > Historique Interventions.

minor.issue: 403 errors in console for some blob requests - likely SAS token expiration, not blocking functionality

critical_code_review_comments: POST /api/demo/interventions/import-history/preview correctly parses CSV and ZIP files
GET /api/demo/interventions/historique-import returns only imported interventions with proper filters
Chunked upload (init-upload, upload-chunk, finalize-upload) endpoints working
Address matching logic in address_utils.py correctly matches interventions to batiments
Frontend Historique tab shows 'Importé' badge (data-testid='import-badge') for imported interventions
HistoriqueInterventionsBatiment component shows interventions in batiment detail modal with 'Importé' badge
ImportInterventions component accessible via Paramètres > Imports CSV > Historique Interventions tab
seed_data_creation: 3 interventions imported from /tmp/test_interventions.csv with import_source='history_import'. 6+ dossier adresses imported from /tmp/DossierAdresse.zip
context_for_next_testing_agent: Import Interventions History feature fully verified. Key endpoints: (1) POST /api/demo/interventions/import-history/preview - accepts CSV/ZIP, returns preview with matched/unmatched counts. (2) POST /api/demo/interventions/import-history/execute - creates interventions with import_source='history_import'. (3) GET /api/demo/interventions/historique-import - returns imported interventions with filters. (4) GET /api/demo/batiments/{id}/interventions-historique - returns interventions linked to batiment. (5) GET /api/demo/import-history/dossier-adresses - returns stored dossier adresses. Frontend: Historique tab in Interventions shows 'Importé' badge. Batiment detail modal shows HistoriqueInterventionsBatiment section. ImportInterventions component at Paramètres > Imports CSV > Historique Interventions.
